SOME TREES FELL ON HOUSES...VEHICLES AND OTHER STRUCTURES. THE TORNADO DISSIPATED NEAR THE SOUTHEAST PART OF DEEP LAKE IN NORTH OAKS. THE TORNADO WAS RATED EF-0 WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 80 MPH.
